summary: Velion AI Assistant - Iteration 134. All backend (13/13) and frontend tests passed. Verified: GET /api/velion/player-status returns triggers, suggestions, player_context, stats_summary. POST /api/velion/ask with keywords returns AI response (source: 'ai') in Italian via GPT-4o-mini. Empty text returns default message. VelionPanel has two tabs (Tutorial + Chiedi a Velion). Tutorial shows 16 steps with navigation (Avanti/Indietro/Salta). Chat shows initial message, user messages right-aligned, Velion responses left-aligned with avatar. Bubble notification appears with triggers and auto-hides after 8 seconds. Breathing animation and glow ring verified.
critical_code_review_comments: velion.py: Properly implements rule-based fallback when AI fails or EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not set
velion.py: analyze_player_state correctly identifies stuck films, pending revenue, coming soon countdown, PvP notifications
VelionPanel.jsx: Two tabs (Tutorial + Chat) with proper data-testid attributes
VelionPanel.jsx: ChatTab uses api.post('/velion/ask') and displays messages with correct alignment
VelionOverlay.jsx: Polls /velion/player-status every 60s with 3s initial delay
VelionOverlay.jsx: Bubble auto-hides after 8 seconds via setTimeout
VelionOverlay.jsx: Breathing animation via framer-motion scale [1, 1.04, 1]
VelionOverlay.jsx: Enhanced glow when hasAlert=true (rgba(0,255,200,0.6) vs rgba(0,180,255,0.4))
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with stuck film trigger
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion AI Assistant fully verified. Key findings: 1) Backend uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key with rule-based fallback. 2) Player status analyzes: pending revenue, stuck films (>2h idle), coming soon countdown (<1h), PvP notifications, no active films, low quality films. 3) VelionPanel opens via 'velion-tutorial-open' event dispatch. 4) Bubble notification appears after 3s delay when triggers exist, auto-hides after 8s. 5) Daily reward popup may appear after login - close with 'Riscuoti' button. 6) All text in Italian as required.

chat_initial_message.message: Sono Velion. Chiedimi qualsiasi cosa sul gioco.

bubble_notification.trigger_message: "Il Grande Mistero" e fermo. Prosegui ora per non perdere tempo.
